MERMAID_LEVEL0
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Analyst["Analyst / User"]
    MATM["Multi-Agent LLM Threat Modeler"]
    xAI["xAI Grok API (Internet)"]
    GitHub["GitHub Repository (Internet)"]
    PyPI["PyPI Package Index (Internet)"]
    Contrib["Contributor"]
    Analyst -->|"Architecture description"| MATM
    MATM -->|"if-01 HTTPS [Internet API Boundary]"| xAI
    MATM -->|"if-02 SSH/HTTPS [Internet VCS Boundary]"| GitHub
    MATM -->|"if-03 HTTPS [Supply Chain Boundary]"| PyPI
    Contrib -->|"if-04 Git [Contributor Trust Boundary]"| GitHub
    xAI -->|"LLM responses"| MATM
    classDef boundary fill:#ffeeba,stroke:#856404
    class xAI,GitHub,PyPI boundary
```

MERMAID_LEVEL1
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    SS01["Agent Pipeline (ss-01)"]
    SS02["LLM Integration Layer (ss-02)"]
    SS03["Supply Chain and Dev Env (ss-03)"]
    xAI_ext["xAI Grok API (external)"]
    GitHub_ext["GitHub (external)"]
    PyPI_ext["PyPI (external)"]
    SS01 -->|"LLM adapter calls"| SS02
    SS02 -->|"if-01 HTTPS [Internet API Boundary]"| xAI_ext
    SS03 -->|"if-02 SSH/HTTPS [Internet VCS Boundary]"| GitHub_ext
    SS03 -->|"if-03 HTTPS [Supply Chain Boundary]"| PyPI_ext
    Contrib["Contributor"] -->|"if-04 Git [Contributor Trust Boundary]"| GitHub_ext
    classDef boundary fill:#ffeeba,stroke:#856404
    class xAI_ext,GitHub_ext,PyPI_ext boundary
```

MERMAID_LEVEL2
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    XAI["XaiAdapter (cmp-04)"]
    GrokAPI["xAI Grok API (external)"]
    DevWS["Developer Workstation (cmp-07)"]
    GitHub["GitHub Repository (cmp-06)"]
    PipVenv["Python venv and pip (cmp-08)"]
    PyPI["PyPI (external)"]
    Contrib["Contributor Account"]
    XAI -->|"if-01 HTTPS REST [S:3 T:4 I:4 E:4]"| GrokAPI
    DevWS -->|"if-02 SSH/HTTPS [S:4 T:3 E:3]"| GitHub
    PipVenv -->|"if-03 HTTPS [S:4 T:5 E:5]"| PyPI
    Contrib -->|"if-04 Git [S:4 T:5 E:4]"| GitHub
    classDef high fill:#f8d7da,stroke:#721c24
    classDef external fill:#ffeeba,stroke:#856404
    class XAI,DevWS,PipVenv,Contrib high
    class GrokAPI,PyPI external
```
